scope: first-pass closed-loop comparison on random dynamic loads
health_model: deterministic action-driven engineering proxy; online D-to-theta-to-IV updates retained; no precise physical-rate claim
health_ablation: same plant health evolution; planner degradation and performance-loss weights disabled only for instant_no_health
zuo_role: system N+1 logic and slow/fast random-load matrices only
action_grid_note: 60 A is an IV-model interpolation point added between audited 25 A and 90 A points so equal-load baselines can track the 16.57 kW low state
